ModMetaData.name: Harper and Friends
ModMetaData.author: Hawkimport
ModMetaData.description:
A mod that adds gryphons that work like humans. They are able to do jobs like crafting, cleaning, medical and more as well as able to be drafted. There are 3 grypnons in this base mod as well as pleny of gryphon related equipment.
Credits: Anthitei - Textures for gryphons and pillow ottersholdhands - several snips of code to help some custom features
